raw_reaction: 筋は通っているが、Volterraレゾルベントや時間順序積分を生成作用素と言い換えた部分が大きい。停止時刻との対応は明確でも、生涯忘れないほどの別解とは言えない。
reason: The candidate correctly represents survival prefixes as powers of the Volterra creation operator and obtains e from the resolvent, but it is too close to existing Volterra/time-ordered operator solutions to justify the exact target line.
